profile.Fund Name: JS Momentum Factor Exchange Traded Fund
profile.Investment Objective: The objective of JS Momentum Factor Exchange Traded Fund (JSMF ETF) is to track the authorized Index constituted by the Management Company as specified in this Offering Document.
profile.Fund Investment Policy: JS Momentum Factor Exchange Traded Fund (JSMFETF) is a Smart Beta ETF. Smart Beta, constructs indexes based on criteria other than market capitalization. JSMFETF is designed to track this custom index called the JS Momentum Factor Index (JSMF).
profile.Management Fee: 2.5% per annum on Net Assets of the Fund
profile.Trustee: Central Depository Company of Pakistan Ltd.
profile.Dividend Distribution Policy: The fund may distribute profits to Unit Holders as either bonus units (stock dividends) or cash dividends, ensuring that at least 90% of the accounting income (excluding unrealized capital gains and after expenses) is distributed.

profile.Fund Name: Mahaana Islamic Index Exchange Traded Fund
profile.Investment Objective: Mahaana Islamic Index ETF(MIIETF) is a Shariah Compliant open-ended scheme that is traded on Pakistan Stock Exchange and shall aim to track the performance of the Benchmark index. The index shall be periodically rebalanced and reconstituted as specified in the offering document in order to provide long-term capital appreciation and dividend yield to the investors.
profile.Fund Investment Policy: The Fund invests in a basket of 30 Shariah Compliant equity securities that are part of the Benchmark Index. Weights of the constituents will be based on the free float market capitalisation of each stock in the Benchmark.
profile.Management Fee: Up to 0.70% p.a. of the net assets of the fund
profile.Trustee: Central Depository Company of Pakistan Ltd.
profile.Dividend Distribution Policy: The fund may distribute profits to Unit Holders as either bonus units (stock dividends) or cash dividends, ensuring that at least 90% of the accounting income (excluding unrealized capital gains and after expenses) is distributed.

profile.Fund Name: Alfalah Consumer Index Exchange Traded Fund
profile.Investment Objective: Alfalah Consumer Index Exchange Traded Fund (ACIETF) aims to track the performance of the Benchmark index in order to provide long-term capital appreciation and dividends yield to the investors.
profile.Fund Investment Policy: The Index strategy would be consumer focused and would comprise of a maximum of 20 stocks. The ETFs focuses on 7 sectors which are direct beneficiaries of growing consumer demand in the country.
profile.Management Fee: 0.50% of the net assets per annum
profile.Trustee: Central Depository Company of Pakistan Ltd.
profile.Auditor: A.F. Ferguson and Co, Chartered Accountants
profile.Dividend Distribution Policy: The fund may distribute profits to Unit Holders as either bonus units (stock dividends) or cash dividends, ensuring that at least 90% of the accounting income (excluding unrealized capital gains and after expenses) is distributed.

profile.Fund Name: NBP Pakistan Growth Exchange Traded Fund
profile.Investment Objective: NBP Pakistan Growth Exchange Traded Fund (NBPG-ETF) aims to track the authorized benchmark index as per the investment methodology constituted by the Management Company.
profile.Fund Investment Policy: The fund aims to track the performance of the benchmark index by investing into 15 blue chip companies across 6 sectors based on Market Capitalization, Liquidity & Volume.
profile.Management Fee: Up to 0.75% of the net assets per annum
profile.Trustee: Central Depository Company of Pakistan Limited
profile.Dividend Distribution Policy: The fund may distribute profits to Unit Holders as either bonus units (stock dividends) or cash dividends, ensuring that at least 90% of the accounting income (excluding unrealized capital gains and after expenses) is distributed.

profile.Fund Name: UBL Pakistan Enterprise Exchange Traded Fund
profile.Investment Objective: UBL Pakistan Enterprise Exchange Traded Fund (UBL PAK ETF) aims to track the performance of the Benchmark index in order to provide long-term capital appreciation and dividends yield to the investors.
profile.Fund Investment Policy: The fund aims to track the performance of top 9 companies with highest free float market capitalization of KSE-100 index (excluding Oil and Gas sector companies).
profile.Management Fee: 0.65% of the net assets per annum
profile.Trustee: Central Depository Company of Pakistan Ltd.
profile.Dividend Distribution Policy: The fund may distribute profits to Unit Holders as either bonus units (stock dividends) or cash dividends, ensuring that at least 90% of the accounting income (excluding unrealized capital gains and after expenses) is distributed.
